/usr/bin/c++   -O3 -Wall -Wno-deprecated-register -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-return-type -std=c++14  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/platosim.dir/source/main.cpp.o  -o platosim   -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/hdf5-1.12.0/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/armadillo-6.500.4/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/yaml-cpp/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/fftw-3.3.4/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/Faddeeva/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/zeromq-4.1.4/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/hdf5-1.12.0/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/armadillo-6.500.4/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/yaml-cpp/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/fftw-3.3.4/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/Faddeeva/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/zeromq-4.1.4/lib libplatosimLibrary.a -lhdf5 -lhdf5_cpp -larmadillo -lyaml-cpp -lfftw3f -lfftw3f_threads -lpthread -lFaddeeva -lzmq
